content: 扬州市重点河道水位实时情况（含超警戒判断）。
我来查询扬州市重点河道的实时水位情况，并判断是否超警戒水位。

function.name: execute_code
function.arguments:
{"code":"import pymysql

conn = pymysql.connect(
    host='192.168.100.103', port=3306, user='root',
    password='<SL323_DB_PASSWORD>', database='sl323', charset='utf8mb4',
    connect_timeout=30, read_timeout=30
)

# 先检查数据新鲜度
with conn.cursor() as cur:
    cur.execute("SELECT MAX(tm) FROM st_river_r")
    latest = cur.fetchone()[0]
    print(f"最新数据时间: {latest}")

# 查询河道水位 + 防洪指标，判断超警戒/超保证
sql = """
SELECT 
    r.stcd,
    r.tm,
    r.z AS current_z,
    rv.WRZ,
    rv.GRZ,
    CASE
        WHEN r.z > rv.GRZ THEN '🔴 超保证水位（红色预警）'
        WHEN r.z > rv.WRZ THEN '🟡 超警戒水位（黄色预警）'
        ELSE '🟢 正常'
    END AS warning_level,
    CASE
        WHEN rv.GRZ IS NOT NULL AND r.z > rv.GRZ THEN ROUND(r.z - rv.GRZ, 3)
        WHEN rv.WRZ IS NOT NULL AND r.z > rv.WRZ THEN ROUND(r.z - rv.WRZ, 3)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS exceed_m,
    CASE
        WHEN rv.GRZ IS NOT NULL AND r.z <= rv.GRZ THEN ROUND(rv.GRZ - r.z, 3)
        WHEN rv.WRZ IS NOT NULL AND rv.GRZ IS NULL AND r.z <= rv.WRZ THEN ROUND(rv.WRZ - r.z, 3)
        WHEN rv.WRZ IS NOT NULL AND rv.GRZ IS NULL THEN ROUND(rv.WRZ - r.z, 3)
        ELSE NULL
    END AS safety_margin
FROM st_river_r r
LEFT JOIN st_rvfcch_b rv ON r.stcd = rv.STCD
WHERE r.tm = (SELECT MAX(tm) FROM st_river_r)
ORDER BY 
    CASE
        WHEN r.z > rv.GRZ THEN 1
        WHEN r.z > rv.WRZ THEN 2
        ELSE 3
    END,
    r.z DESC
"""

with conn.cursor(pymysql.cursors.DictCursor) as cur:
    cur.execute(sql)
    rows = cur.fetchall()

print(f"\n共查询到 {len(rows)} 个河道站点：\n")
print(f"{'站点编码':<12} {'水位(m)':<10} {'警戒水位':<10} {'保证水位':<10} {'状态':<24} {'超出/安全余量(m)'}")
print("-" * 90)

warning_count = 0
for row in rows:
    wrz = row['WRZ'] if row['WRZ'] else '—'
    grz = row['GRZ'] if row['GRZ'] else '—'
    exceed = row['exceed_m'] if row['exceed_m'] else ''
    margin = row['safety_margin'] if row['safety_margin'] else ''
    if row['exceed_m']:
        val = f"+{row['exceed_m']}"
        warning_count += 1
    elif row['safety_margin']:
        val = f"-{row['safety_margin']}"
    else:
        val = '—'
    
    stcd_display = row['stcd']
    print(f"{stcd_display:<12} {row['current_z']:<10.3f} {str(wrz):<10} {str(grz):<10} {row['warning_level']:<24} {val}")

print(f"\n{'='*90}")
print(f"预警汇总: {warning_count} 个站点触发预警")

if warning_count == 0:
    print("✅ 所有站点水位正常，无预警。")
else:
    print("⚠️  存在超警戒/超保证水位站点，请重点关注！")

conn.close()"}

content: 现在让我查询这些站点的名称，让结果更易读：

function.name: execute_code
function.arguments:
{"code":"import pymysql

conn = pymysql.connect(
    host='192.168.100.103', port=3306, user='root',
    password='<SL323_DB_PASSWORD>', database='sl323', charset='utf8mb4',
    connect_timeout=30, read_timeout=30
)

# 查询超警戒站点 + 站名
sql = """
SELECT 
    r.stcd,
    s.stnm AS station_name,
    r.tm,
    r.z AS current_z,
    rv.WRZ,
    rv.GRZ,
    CASE
        WHEN r.z > rv.GRZ THEN '🔴 超保证水位（红色预警）'
        WHEN r.z > rv.WRZ THEN '🟡 超警戒水位（黄色预警）'
        ELSE '🟢 正常'
    END AS warning_level,
    ROUND(r.z - rv.WRZ, 3) AS exceed_wrz
FROM st_river_r r
LEFT JOIN st_rvfcch_b rv ON r.stcd = rv.STCD
LEFT JOIN st_stbprp_b s ON r.stcd = s.STCD
WHERE r.tm = (SELECT MAX(tm) FROM st_river_r)
  AND r.z > rv.WRZ
ORDER BY (r.z - rv.WRZ) DESC
"""

with conn.cursor(pymysql.cursors.DictCursor) as cur:
    cur.execute(sql)
    warnings = cur.fetchall()

print("⚠️  超警戒水位站点（黄色预警）— 共 {} 个\n".format(len(warnings)))
print(f"{'排名':<4} {'站点名称':<20} {'站点编码':<18} {'当前水位':<10} {'警戒水位':<10} {'超出量(m)':<10}")
print("-" * 80)

for i, row in enumerate(warnings, 1):
    name = row['station_name'] or '未命名'
    print(f"{i:<4} {name:<20} {row['stcd']:<18} {row['current_z']:<10.3f} {row['WRZ']:<10} +{row['exceed_wrz']:<9.3f}")

# 查询无防洪指标的站点（有水位数据但无警戒/保证水位）
sql_no_index = """
SELECT 
    r.stcd,
    s.stnm AS station_name,
    r.tm,
    r.z AS current_z
FROM st_river_r r
LEFT JOIN st_rvfcch_b rv ON r.stcd = rv.STCD
LEFT JOIN st_stbprp_b s ON r.stcd = s.STCD
WHERE r.tm = (SELECT MAX(tm) FROM st_river_r)
  AND rv.WRZ IS NULL
ORDER BY r.z DESC
"""

with conn.cursor(pymysql.cursors.DictCursor) as cur:
    cur.execute(sql_no_index)
    no_index = cur.fetchall()

print(f"\n\n📊 无防洪指标数据的站点（{len(no_index)} 个）— 无法判断是否超警戒\n")
print(f"{'站点名称':<20} {'站点编码':<18} {'当前水位(m)'}")
print("-" * 55)
for row in no_index:
    name = row['station_name'] or '未命名'
    print(f"{name:<20} {row['stcd']:<18} {row['current_z']:.3f}")

conn.close()"}
